basic.question_text: 创建一张名为 databases 的表，包含：Name (TEXT), Version (REAL), Download_count (INTEGER)。
basic.question_context: CREATE TABLE databases (name TEXT, version REAL, download_count INTEGER);
basic.reference_sql: CREATE TABLE databases (name TEXT, version REAL, download_count INTEGER);
accept_alternatives: CREATE TABLE databases (Name TEXT, Version REAL, Download_count INTEGER);
hints: CREATE TABLE 表名 (列名 类型, ...);
CREATE TABLE databases (name TEXT, version REAL, download_count INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE databases (name TEXT, version REAL, download_count INTEGER);
basic.verification_sql: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='databases';

intermediate.question_text: 创建一张 studios 表，包含：id (INTEGER PRIMARY KEY), name (TEXT NOT NULL), founded_year (INTEGER), headquarters (TEXT)。
intermediate.question_context: 注意 PRIMARY KEY 和 NOT NULL 约束。
intermediate.reference_sql: CREATE TABLE studios (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, founded_year INTEGER, headquarters TEXT);
hints: PRIMARY KEY 确保 id 唯一，NOT NULL 确保 name 不能为空
CREATE TABLE studios (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, founded_year INTEGER, headquarters TEXT);
CREATE TABLE studios (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, founded_year INTEGER, headquarters TEXT);
intermediate.verification_sql: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='studios';

intermediate.question_text: 创建一张 movie_reviews 表，包含：id (INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT), movie_id (INTEGER REFERENCES movies(id)), reviewer (TEXT), score (INTEGER), review_date (TEXT)。
intermediate.question_context: 包含外键 REFERENCES 和自增主键。
intermediate.reference_sql: CREATE TABLE movie_reviews (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, movie_id INTEGER REFERENCES movies(id), reviewer TEXT, score INTEGER, review_date TEXT);
hints: REFERENCES movies(id) 建立外键关系
CREATE TABLE movie_reviews (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, movie_id INTEGER REFERENCES movies(id), reviewer TEXT, score INTEGER, review_date TEXT);
CREATE TABLE movie_reviews (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, movie_id INTEGER REFERENCES movies(id), reviewer TEXT, score INTEGER, review_date TEXT);
intermediate.verification_sql: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='movie_reviews';

challenge.question_text: 设计并创建一张 film_festivals 表，包含：festival_id (自增主键), name (非空), location (TEXT), year (INTEGER), 并添加 UNIQUE 约束确保同一个节展不能在同一年同一地点举办两次。
challenge.reference_sql: CREATE TABLE film_festivals (festival_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name TEXT NOT NULL, location TEXT, year INTEGER, UNIQUE(name, year, location));
hints: UNIQUE(列1, 列2, ...) 创建联合唯一约束
CREATE TABLE film_festivals (festival_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name TEXT NOT NULL, location TEXT, year INTEGER, UNIQUE(name, year, location));
CREATE TABLE film_festivals (festival_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name TEXT NOT NULL, location TEXT, year INTEGER, UNIQUE(name, year, location));
challenge.verification_sql: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='film_festivals';
